channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Think EV battery swap tech is a gimmick? Chinese EV company Nio says it swapped a million batteries in a week
item.description: Nio is swapping more than 1 million EV batteries a week, as China pulls away on the innovative EV charging technology

item.title: Family sues OpenAI, alleging ChatGPT advice led to accidental overdose
item.description: The complaint says ChatGPT started giving Sam Nelson advice about drug use with the launch of GPT-4o.
